mapper.select: SELECT id, section_id, question_text, options_json, correct_option, explanation, created_at FROM listening_library_questions WHERE section_id = #{sectionId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_library_questions (section_id, question_text, options_json, correct_option, explanation) VALUES (#{sectionId}, #{questionText}, #{optionsJson}, #{correctOption}, #{explanation})
